hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '\.tsx?"' && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -5 || true
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE 'src/client/.*\.tsx?("|$)' && pnpm exec eslint $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS 2>&1 | tail -10 || true

echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE 'src/server/db/migrations/.*\.sql' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: Mirror this migration into src/server/db/schema.sql (the canonical schema for new tenants). The two files must stay in sync."}}' || true
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q 'src/server/db/migrations/' && echo 'BLOCKED: Migration already applied to production. Create a new migration file instead.' && exit 1 || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE '(^| )git add (-A|--all|\.)( |$)' && echo 'BLOCKED: stage specific paths instead of `git add -A` or `git add .` (per global preference in ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md). Pass explicit filenames to git add.' && exit 1 || true

[ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true
